control_definition: Healthy or adjacent normal liver tissue
comparison_label: HCC tumor versus healthy or adjacent-normal liver across the 10 disclosed discovery cohorts
inclusion_rule_summary: Use only the 10 transcriptomic cohorts explicitly listed in the CDK20 paper discovery methods.
exclusion_rule_summary: Do not let AlphaFold targetability, Chemistry42 generation, or later biochemical assays leak into the discovery contrast.
leakage_risks: Target-discovery evidence must stay separate from later chemistry success.
Adjacent-normal tissue may not be equivalent to healthy liver across all cohorts.

provenance.notes: The paper gives aggregate sample totals across these cohorts, but not a fully resolved per-cohort count table in the extracted text.
